news.title: DEBITAM
news.summary:
01 // PRE-PRODUCTION Idea Generation & Iteration Script Writing • Storyboard/Shot List • Concept Refinement • Logistics • Casting • Crew Hire • Scouting • Prep Building on the high-quality, narrative-driven content we’d produced for Debitam previously, we began the production with a discovery call to get a better insight into the company’s content goals and to understand what they needed.
Once ‘The Ritual’ idea was selected, our creative team put together a series of moodboards to show what we wanted the video to look like.
In addition, we drafted an early script and storyboard and refined these as we went along.

news.title: Online Accounting and Tax Filing Services
news.summary: What do we do You are already too busy with the daily grind as a business owner, what you need is an accountant who's prompt and reliable and can set you ready for the next step by making use of clear and business-focused language without paperwork faff, in other words, we do online accounting

news.title: Online accounting help
news.summary:
Cash basis of accounting deals with recognising revenues- when cash is actually received and expenses- when cash is actually paid.
If you've never registered for self-assessment with HMRC ever before, then you need to register for it online on gov.uk website.
Once you register, HMRC will set up your self-assessment online service account and send you a letter with your UTR.
You need to re-register online via form CWF1 if you've sent a self-assessment return online before.
The umbrella company will raise an invoice to the recruitment agency, which will subsequently bill the end-client.

sales_signals: Businesses looking for HMRC compliance support

ai_insights.summary: Debitam is an established online accounting and tax filing service provider based in London, serving over 26,000 small businesses. The company has built a strong reputation with a #1 Trustpilot ranking and partnerships with major financial institutions. They focus on making tax filing simple and stress-free through their digital platform.

notes: Company operates under trading name Debitam but legal entity is Online Account Filing Limited
Domain registered in 2022, but company incorporated in 2018
Strong digital presence with significant social media following
